rationale: The current version in the provided MDX already incorporates the fixes suggested in the previous judge report (it uses 'se tambalea' instead of 'tamborilea' and 'se rasga ahora las vestiduras' instead of 'rasga ahora las manos'). The translation is high quality, maintains Dan's direct style, and correctly handles the technical metadata and MDX structure. It is the most polished version available.

suggestionLog.match: la civilización tamborilea al borde de la idiocia
suggestionLog.replacement: la civilización se tambalea al borde de la idiocia

suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.replacement: ¿Quién se rasga ahora las vestiduras por la pérdida
suggestionLog.reason: The idiom in Spanish is 'rasgarse las vestiduras' (to wring one's hands/be outraged), not 'rasgarse las manos'.
